notes: The article provides a well-structured, practical guide to implementing Planning AI with memory in logistics workflows.

Add a short conclusion section to summarize key points and reinforce the main message about the importance of memory in Planning AI.
Include a call-to-action (CTA) at the end to encourage reader engagement, such as inviting comments or sharing experiences.
